text: Everything feels washed in artificial blues and purples, an unreal glow isolating me from the normal pace of life. I see emptiness in the halls and sterile glass, and the distant hum of electronics matches the clinical, experimental vibe. The R+D sign tells me this is a place for invention, but right now all I feel is how small and speculative I am in this silent, uninhabited sanctuary dedicated to progress. The world here seems paused between curiosity and coldness.
